queries.question: Who are the flight attendants from New Horizons Aviation and also the pilots from New Horizons Aviation?
queries.sql:
SELECT Flight_Attendants.Name
FROM Training_Center JOIN Flight_Attendants ON Training_Center.ID = Flight_Attendants.Training_Center_ID
WHERE Training_Center.Name = "New Horizons Aviation"
UNION
SELECT Pilots.Name
FROM Training_Center JOIN Pilots ON Training_Center.ID = Pilots.Training_Center_ID
WHERE Training_Center.Name = "New Horizons Aviation"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?training_center a :Training_Center .
    ?flight_attendants a :Flight_Attendants .
    ?flight_attendants p:hasTraining_Center ?training_center .
    ?flight_attendants p:name ?name .
    ?training_center p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "New Horizons Aviation")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?training_center a :Training_Center .
    ?pilots a :Pilots .
    ?pilots p:hasTraining_Center ?training_center .
    ?pilots p:name ?name .
    ?training_center p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "New Horizons Aviation")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Display the flight attendants and pilots from New Horizons Aviation.
queries.sql:
SELECT Flight_Attendants.Name
FROM Training_Center JOIN Flight_Attendants ON Training_Center.ID = Flight_Attendants.Training_Center_ID
UNION
SELECT Pilots.Name
FROM Training_Center JOIN Pilots ON Training_Center.ID = Pilots.Training_Center_ID

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
